Fabrika zemininde etiket okutarak switch: Instantly go to the switch, endpoint, camera or IT presence by scanning the label on the factory floor.

Cihazın o anki konfigürasyonunu çeker ve: It pulls the current configuration of the device and saves it in the safe vault.
Kullanıcılar sisteme girdiklerinde sırad: When users enter the system, instead of opening an ordinary fault record, they can make a technical request as if they were ordering from the Service Catalogue you created.
Yapay Zeka Destekli Tahminleyici Bakım (: The Artificial Intelligence Assisted Predictive Maintenance module calculates the occupancy rate of the devices with Linear Regression and opens tickets autonomously 14 days before the system crashes.
Dışarıdan gelen Wazuh veya SIEM logları: Wazuh or Siem logs from outside are imported via Webhook. When attacks such as Brute-Force on devices are detected, the system automatically quarantines the relevant IP on the device.
Toplu Konfigürasyon menüsünü kullanarak: Using the Batch Configuration menu, you can simultaneously print one-click configurations to 100 devices without tiring the devices (with Asynchronous Celery).
